test.command: set -e; ROOT="/Users/lubomirmolin/PhpstormProjects/codex-mobile-companion"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ] && [ ! -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ] && [ ! -d "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell" ]; then echo "workspace not scaffolded yet"; exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ]; then (cd "$ROOT/apps/mobile" && flutter test --concurrency=5); fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ]; then cargo test --manifest-path "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" --workspace --jobs 5; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj" ]; then xcodebuild test -project "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj" -scheme CodexMobileCompanion -destination 'platform=macOS'; fi

typecheck.command: ROOT="/Users/lubomirmolin/PhpstormProjects/codex-mobile-companion"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ] && [ ! -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ] && [ ! -d "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell" ]; then echo "workspace not scaffolded yet"; exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ]; then flutter analyze "$ROOT/apps/mobile"; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ]; then cargo check --manifest-path "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" --workspace --all-targets; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj" ]; then xcodebuild -project "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj" -scheme CodexMobileCompanion -destination 'platform=macOS' build >/dev/null; fi

lint.command: set -e; ROOT="/Users/lubomirmolin/PhpstormProjects/codex-mobile-companion"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ] && [ ! -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ] && [ ! -d "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell" ]; then echo "workspace not scaffolded yet"; exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ]; then flutter analyze "$ROOT/apps/mobile"; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ]; then cargo fmt --manifest-path "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" --all --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj" ]; then xcodebuild -project "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj" -scheme CodexMobileCompanion -destination 'platform=macOS' build >/dev/null; fi

blockingIssues.description: The hardening notification implementation only routes events through in-app SnackBar UI plus a persisted launch-target secret; it does not add real background or terminated-app notification delivery/open handling, so VAL-CROSS-002/008/009/010 are not fully satisfied end to end.

The new live-bridge approval integration test validates direct bridge API calls but never boots the Flutter app or exercises the real approvals queue/detail/approve/reject UI on iOS and Android, so the feature still lacks live-target evidence for the user-visible approval flow it claims to validate.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document an Exec-mode fallback for lifecycle-heavy cross-device validation so workers can satisfy the procedure with explicit automated simulator/emulator evidence when OS-level interactive flows cannot be driven.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three hardening reviews flagged the same procedure gap. The integration-first-run-end-to-end-journey and integration-platform-parity-and-build-closure handoffs both recorded skill deviations only because step 6 still requires manual lifecycle walkthroughs, and the notifications hardening review found the same gap for background/cold-start notification validation in Exec mode.

rejectedObservations.observation: The notifications review's skill-gap note about manual lifecycle verification in Exec mode.
The first-run review's skill-gap note about documenting automated integration-harness fallback for Exec mode.
Update .factory/library/user-testing.md to document the new live-bridge approval integration harness used by the parity/build-closure feature.
